n: Mission: The Further Adventures of Elladan & Elrohir, Chapter 3

steps.t: Your party has paused to take a break from the snow, but it's time to move on. Elladan has something to say to you.
Elrohir has disappeared into the blizzard. You should talk to Elladan.
You have found a snow-beast corpse and some blood. Did Elrohir pass through here? You should examine them.
It's possible that Elrohir passed through here, but you still have not found him. You should talk to Elladan.
